00010 #include <boost/tr1/unordered_map.hpp>
00011 #include <boost/format.hpp>
00012 
00013 namespace sprite
00014 {
00016   extern h_func_type builtin_h[OP_END];

00019   extern std::string builtin_ctor[C_END];

00024 
00025 // TODO remove this hard reference
00026 extern boost::shared_ptr<sprite::Module> load_list(sprite::Loader &);
00027 
00028 namespace sprite
00029 {
00031   struct Program : Loader
00032   {
00033     Program();
00034   private:
00035     tr1::unordered_map<std::string, shared_ptr<Module> > m_imported;
00036   public:
00038     shared_ptr<Module const> import(std::string name);
00039 
00040     virtual ~Program() {}
00041 
00043     typedef std::vector<h_func_type> oper_t;
00044 
00046     oper_t oper;
00047 
00049     typedef std::vector<std::string> label_t;
00050 
00052     label_t ctor_label;
00053 
00055     label_t oper_label;
00056 
00058     virtual size_t insert_ctor(std::string const & name);
00059 
00061     virtual size_t insert_oper(std::string const & name, h_func_type h);
00062 
00063     template<typename Stream>
00064     friend Stream & operator<<(Stream & out, Program const & pgm)
00065     {
00066       boost::format fmt("%6d \"%s\"\n");
00067       out << "Program @ " << &pgm;
00068       
00069       out << "\n====== CONSTRUCTORS ======\n";
00070       for(size_t i=0; i<pgm.ctor_label.size(); ++i)
00071         { out << fmt % i % pgm.ctor_label.at(i); } 
00072 
00073       out << "\n====== OPERATIONS ======\n";
00074       for(size_t i=0; i<pgm.oper_label.size(); ++i)
00075         { out << fmt % i % pgm.oper_label.at(i); }
00076 
00077       return (out << std::endl);
00078     }
00079   };
00080 }
